title: Goals Widget Filtering Issue
excerpt: Hi all, I have been trying and failing to get the filtering to work in the goals Widget.  This is probably going to be the cause of not continuing using the CRM.  It is a pretty huge part of the argument that management …

posts.author: joel.devey (Joel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, I have been trying and failing to get the filtering to work in the goals Widget. This is probably going to be the cause of not continuing using the CRM. It is a pretty huge part of the argument that management want to see those stats and it simply can’t show them. I understand that this is a Beat version, but that means it should still constantly be updated?

image1508×702 141 KB

image1872×942 67.9 KB

I would really appreciate if I could get an idea if this is even something that is going to be fixed in the near future or isn’t a concern for the Monday.com developers. So far this is the one thing that is really holding the whole module back that I can see.

posts.author: Loren075Keyser (Loren075Keyser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
Pleased to see your issue as I think I have the same problem.

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Since it’s a Beta version, there’s a chance the filtering feature might still be a work in progress.

posts.author: jamesdornan (James)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes i hope this is fixed soon. Very frustrating trying to get a report from this widget.
